options.name: The Torn
options.description: Died by violence — murder, war, or brutal accident.

options.name: The Silent
options.description: Died by deprivation — starvation, suffocation, heartbreak.
options.hint: Favored Keys: Stillness and Cold Wind

options.name: The Prey
options.description: Died by nature — exposure, wild animals, freak accident.

options.name: The Stricken
options.description: Died by sickness — disease, plague, slow illness.

options.name: The Forgotten
options.description: Died by chance — freak accident, wrong place, wrong time.

group2.label: Geist
group2.placeholder: Name and describe your Geist — the ghost of immense power bound to your soul.

powers.label: Manifestations
powers.description: Distribute 3 dots among Manifestations. Manifestations are the ghostly powers your geist enables — their exact expression is shaped by the Keys you choose.

items.name: Boneyard
items.description: Assert dominion over a territory — a plasm-infused area your geist haunts and controls.

items.name: Caul
items.description: Reshape your own body with deathly energies, granting transformation and protection.

items.name: Curse
items.description: Lay hexes and misfortune upon enemies at range — afflicting mind, body, and luck.

items.name: Marionette
items.description: Control objects, animals, and people through ghostly sympathetic links.

items.name: Oracle
items.description: Heightened senses, clairvoyance, and perception of the dead and unseen world.

items.name: Rage
items.description: Direct your geist to strike at enemies with pure, unadulterated supernatural force.

items.name: Shroud
items.description: Cloak and protect yourself with deathly energies — armor and concealment from your geist.

keys.label: Keys
keys.description: Choose 2 Keys. One must be from your Threshold's favored pair. Keys determine how each Manifestation expresses itself when you use it.

items.name: Cold Wind Key
items.description: Frigid air and icy cold — Manifestations wrapped in winter's deathly chill.

items.name: Grave-Dirt Key
items.description: Earth and burial grounds — Manifestations channeled through soil and tombs.

items.name: Industrial Key
items.description: Machinery and technology — Manifestations expressed through man-made devices.

items.name: Passion Key
items.description: Emotion and desire — Manifestations fueled by the passions of the living and dead.

items.name: Phantasmal Key
items.description: Illusion and madness — Manifestations that deceive perception and warp reality.

items.name: Primeval Key
items.description: Wild nature and animals — Manifestations channeled through primal, living forces.

items.name: Pyre-Flame Key
items.description: Fire and ash — Manifestations wreathed in the flames that consume the dead.

items.name: Stigmata Key
items.description: Blood and sacrifice — Manifestations that pierce the spirit world and can harm ghosts.

items.name: Stillness Key
items.description: Silence and concealment — Manifestations of invisibility and quiet cessation.

items.name: Tear-Stained Key
items.description: Water and drowning — Manifestations born from death by sea, tears, and flood.
